# PHIL.063 ? Positivism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** positivism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Only scientific knowledge valid; rejection of metaphysics; observable facts; law-like generalizations; unity of science

## Application
Limit claims to observable; scientific method paramount; reject metaphysical speculation; empirical verification; law discovery

## Key Values
- Scientific knowledge
- Empirical verification
- Anti-metaphysics
- Observable facts

philosophy, modern-western, positivism
